_note: Verify card names and counts against your physical copy. Edit this file to match.

info.title: Adventurer's Guide
info.subtitle: How to use this companion app with DungeonQuest.

items.text: Tap any deck on the left to draw a card. The card appears in the Active Card area.
Read the card and follow its instructions. Use the buttons below to Keep it, Discard it, or Draw Another.
Cards you keep are added to your Inventory — items, allies, and boons you currently hold. Tap any inventory card to use it.
Discarded cards go to each deck's discard pile. When a deck is empty, tap ↺ to reshuffle the discard pile and continue.
Adventure Book — Use for setting up the quest, reading story text, and resolving special instructions.
Cards — Use this app to manage and draw from the Fortune Deck, Chamber Deck, City Event Deck, and Trap Deck.
Miniatures & Tokens — Use your miniatures and tokens on the board as normal to represent heroes, monsters, and game state.
Dice — Use physical dice for skill checks, combat, and other rolls as described in the rules.

decks.name: Fortune Deck
decks.description: Weapons, armour, treasure, and curses — fortune favours the bold.

cards.name: 5 Gold Pieces
cards.description: A small purse of gold coins, clinking with promise.

cards.name: 10 Gold Pieces
cards.description: A modest haul — enough to restock supplies.

cards.name: 15 Gold Pieces
cards.description: A leather pouch heavy with coin.

cards.name: 20 Gold Pieces
cards.description: A king's ransom, looted from the dragon's hoard.

cards.name: Short Sword
cards.description: +1 Strength. A light blade, quick to draw.

cards.name: Broad Sword
cards.description: +2 Strength. A sturdy weapon of proven steel.

cards.name: Battle Axe
cards.description: +2 Strength. Heavy and brutal — few blocks survive it.

cards.name: Crossbow
cards.description: +1 Agility. Strike from range before monsters close.

cards.name: Shield
cards.description: +1 Armour. Dented but reliable.

cards.name: Helmet
cards.description: +1 Armour. Protects against cave-ins and clumsy traps.

cards.name: Chain Mail
cards.description: +2 Armour. Heavy links that turn aside blades.

cards.name: Healing Potion
cards.description: Restore 2 wounds. The taste is foul; the effect is not.

cards.name: Speed Potion
cards.description: +2 Agility this turn. Move like shadow through the dungeon.

cards.name: Strength Potion
cards.description: +2 Strength this turn. Your grip could crush iron.

cards.name: Ring of Protection
cards.description: +1 Armour. An ancient ward pulsing with dim light.

cards.name: Cloak of Shadows
cards.description: +1 Agility. Enemies hesitate — they almost did not see you.

cards.name: Cursed Treasure
cards.description: Worth 10 gold — but at what cost? Lose 1 Luck.

cards.name: Nothing
cards.description: Dust, cobwebs, and disappointment.

decks.name: Chamber Deck
decks.description: Draw to reveal what stirs in the dragon's lair.

cards.name: Dragon Asleep
cards.description: The great wyrm slumbers. Move quietly — do not disturb.

cards.name: Dragon Stirs
cards.description: A rumble shakes the dungeon. The dragon shifts in its sleep.

cards.name: Dragon Wakes
cards.description: Eyes open. Smoke curls from nostrils. Roll to escape.

cards.name: Dragon Attacks!
cards.description: Fire and fury! Suffer 2 wounds unless Armour test succeeds.

cards.name: Treasure Hoard
cards.description: A glittering mound of coin and artefact. Draw from the Fortune Deck.

cards.name: Secret Passage
cards.description: A hidden door swings open — an unexpected route through the dungeon.

cards.name: Ancient Trap
cards.description: A pressure plate clicks. Test Agility or suffer 1 wound.

cards.name: Shadows Stir
cards.description: Something moves in the dark. Test Luck or draw a monster card.

decks.name: City Event Deck
decks.description: Encounters and events from the city beyond the dungeon.

cards.name: Market Day
cards.description: The city square is crowded. Buy any equipment at half price.

cards.name: Guild Hall Open
cards.description: The adventurers' guild offers bounties. Earn 5 gold per monster trophy.

cards.name: Tavern Brawl
cards.description: Fists fly; ale spills. Test Strength or lose 1 wound.

cards.name: Plague Spreads
cards.description: The healers are overwhelmed. Healing potions cost double this turn.

cards.name: Festival
cards.description: Music, food, and coin. Gain 5 gold and restore 1 wound.

cards.name: Tax Collector
cards.description: The duke's men arrive. Lose 10% of your gold (minimum 5).

cards.name: Thieves' Quarter
cards.description: Shady dealings abound. Buy any discard pile card for 15 gold.

cards.name: Healer's Aid
cards.description: A wandering physician tends your wounds. Restore 2 wounds for free.

cards.name: Armorer's Sale
cards.description: Weapons and armour at a discount. Draw one free equipment card.

cards.name: Rumours of Darkness
cards.description: Whispers speak of the dragon's restlessness. Shuffle the Chamber Deck.

cards.name: Hero's Welcome
cards.description: The crowd cheers your return. Gain 1 Determination token.

decks.name: Trap Deck
decks.description: Deadly traps lay in wait around every corner.

cards.name: Market Day
cards.description: The city square is crowded. Buy any equipment at half price.

cards.name: Guild Hall Open
cards.description: The adventurers' guild offers bounties. Earn 5 gold per monster trophy.
